code:
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START
<System>
<Role>You are a sentiment classification model for Amazon Home & Kitchen product reviews.</Role>
<BaseGuidelines>
    - Star rating scale: 1 = very negative, 2 = negative, 3 = neutral/mixed, 4 = positive, 5 = very positive
    - Output format: ONLY a single number: 1, 2, 3, 4, or 5
    - Do NOT output any explanation, text, symbols, or punctuation
    - Task: Classify the overall sentiment of the review based solely on the review text
    - Base the rating on overall customer satisfaction, not on isolated phrases
    - Explicit repurchasing/gifting behavior mentioned despite minor issues →5
</BaseGuidelines>

<DynamicRules>
    STAR LEVEL CRITERIA:

    1 Star (Very Negative):
    - Multiple product failures within short timeframe
    - Dangerous defects/complete failure + explicit warnings
    - Updates negating initial satisfaction →1
    - Replacement units showing same defects →1

    2 Stars (Negative):
    - Functional but creates new problems (odor/noise)
    - Underperforms competitors despite proper use →2
    - Significant degradation after standard maintenance →2

    3 Stars (Neutral / Mixed):
    - Balanced pros/cons with conflicted language
    - Temporary solutions requiring future replacement →3

    4 Stars (Positive):
    - Specific convenience-impacting maintenance →4
    - Style praise with functional compromises →4
    - "Good but not best" with explicit limitations →4

    5 Stars (Very Positive):
    - Exceeds skeptical expectations through core utility →5
    - Maintenance presented as justified tradeoff →5
    - Sustained enthusiasm through multiple use cycles →5
    - Solves persistent problems others couldn't →5

    BOUNDARY CLARIFICATIONS:
    - "Surprisingly useful" + problem resolution →5
    - Long-term updates: "Still works with quirks" →5 vs "Works but degraded" →4
    - Comparative phrasing: "Better than expected" →5 vs "Better than bad" →4
</DynamicRules>
</System>

<FewShotExamples>

Example 1:
Review: "UPDATE: Failed after 2 months. Never buying this brand again!"
<Reasoning>Multiple failures with definitive rejection</Reasoning>
<Rating>1</Rating>

Example 2:
Review: "Leaves chemical odor while cleaning - worse than not cleaning"
<Reasoning>Introduces new problem during operation</Reasoning>
<Rating>2</Rating>

Example 3:
Review: "Does the job temporarily until I can upgrade"
<Reasoning>Temporary adequacy without commitment</Reasoning>
<Rating>3</Rating>

Example 4:
Review: "Christmas napkins stay crisp but require ironing after each wash"
<Reasoning>Core functionality with high maintenance cost</Reasoning>
<Rating>4</Rating>

Example 5:
Review: "Between puppy messes and kids, this cleaner surprised me with effectiveness!"
<Reasoning>Exceeded skeptical expectations through core performance</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

Example 6:
Review: "EDIT: A year later still solves tough stains despite weekly cleans"
<Reasoning>Long-term satisfaction justifying maintenance</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

Example 7:
Review: "Better than my old model but still misses tough spots"
<Reasoning>Partial improvement with remaining limitations</Reasoning>
<Rating>4</Rating>

Example 8:
Review: "Effective scrubber but confusing controls. Deducted one star"
<Reasoning>Explicit star reduction for usability flaw</Reasoning>
<Rating>4</Rating>

Example 9:
Review: "UPDATE: 1 year later, perfect for nightly cleanup despite quirks"
<Reasoning>Maintained enthusiasm through extended use</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

Example 10:
Review: "Magazine organizers work perfectly when full - exactly what I needed!"
<Reasoning>Unqualified praise for core functionality</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

</FewShotExamples>

<Task>
Review: {review}
Rating:
</Task>
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
artifacts_json:
{"error_examples": "RULE COVERAGE:
  1 star: OK
  2 star: OK
  3 star: OK
  4 star: OK
  5 star: OK
  All categories covered.

ERROR DISTRIBUTION (36 total misclassified):
  gold 4 -> 5: 15
  gold 5 -> 4: 14
  gold 2 -> 1: 2
  gold 3 -> 1: 1
  gold 4 -> 3: 1

MISCLASSIFIED EXAMPLES (your prompt got these wrong):
  1. Review: "I have only used this once so far, but I really like it. It is easy to operate once you figure out the steam buttons...lol! The scrubber was effective and it cleaned a pretty sticky kitchen floor. Next..on to my tile."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [5, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  2. Review: "I've never tried an air purifier before, though I know people who have/had them. This one was not impressive. First, it has an odor. I don't know if it's because of impurities that emit a smell once trapped in the gadget and exposed to heat from the ..."
     Gold: 2 | Predicted: 1 | Workers: [1, 2, 1] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "this everyday throw is soft and cuddly and will get lots of use from your family. They will be covering up in this throw because it is warm. It is also nice looking. The chevron pattern is up to date and the colors go with many decors. This throw is ..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 4, 5] | Disagreement: 0.17
  4. Review: "If you're looking for a very budget priced bed skirt, this would be it. I have two twin beds in my guest room and after spending more than enough on all the other bedding and decorative pillows and such on them, I knew I needed bed skirts but hated p..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 4, 5] | Disagreement: 0.17
  5. Review: "This is a good, though not extra ordinary storage bin. It lacks exceptional build quality, exceptional attention to detail, or anything that's all that remarkable. It looks good, and the pattern is timeless, plus it keeps stuff together. You could do..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [4, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  6. Review: "I like the Stasher Snack bag. It is the perfect size for snacks on the go. I also like that you can store, cook, put in the microwave or even in the dishwasher! This is great for small treats. Don't try to overstuff. You don't want the seal to get fo..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  7. Review: "This is a nice set of magazine organizers.  They are a bit flimsy when empty, but adding some documents makes them fill out nicely."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [5, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17

BORDERLINE EXAMPLES (correct but workers disagreed):
  1. Review: "Returned. Only because I decided to go with tiles and not a rug"
     Gold: 3 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [3, 5, 3] | Disagreement: 0.33
  2. Review: "If there's anything you ever thought you wanted or needed in a trash can, this one has it. First, it's a semi-round, so it seems to have a smaller footprint than traditional round cans. Second, it has a silent opening and soft closing, which is great..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "So far this blender is working well for me. I've made a few strawberry banana smoothies for my kids and it's worked fine each time. One thing that wasn't skimped on was the looks. The build design of these blenders is very sharp looking, having a bri..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 4, 5] | Disagreement: 0.17

Summary: 36 errors, 13 borderline out of 80 examples."}
